hooks.command: JQ=$(command -v jq || echo /opt/homebrew/bin/jq); sid=$("$JQ" -r ".session_id // empty" 2>/dev/null); case "$sid" in ""|*[!A-Za-z0-9-]*) "$JQ" -n "{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:\"PreToolUse\",permissionDecision:\"deny\",permissionDecisionReason:\"Playback gate: missing or malformed session_id in hook input (configuration error).\"}}"; exit 0;; esac; if [ -f "$HOME/.claude/approvals/$sid" ]; then exit 0; fi; "$JQ" -n --arg sid "$sid" "{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:\"PreToolUse\",permissionDecision:\"deny\",permissionDecisionReason:(\"Playback gate: no user approval recorded for this prompt. If the user explicitly approved the current Playback in chat, record it with: mkdir -p ~/.claude/approvals && touch ~/.claude/approvals/\" + \$sid + \" . Otherwise present a Playback and wait.\")}}"

IN=$(cat); JQ=$(command -v jq || echo /opt/homebrew/bin/jq); sid=$(printf "%s" "$IN" | "$JQ" -r ".session_id // empty" 2>/dev/null); case "$sid" in ""|*[!A-Za-z0-9-]*) exit 0;; esac; p=$(printf "%s" "$IN" | "$JQ" -r ".prompt // empty" 2>/dev/null); case "$p" in "[SYSTEM NOTIFICATION"*|*"<task-notification>"*) exit 0;; esac; f="$HOME/.claude/approvals/$sid"; if [ -e "$f" ]; then rm -f -- "$f" || echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Playback gate: FAILED to clear approval flag - approval may carry over.\"}"; fi; exit 0
